Notice Of Hearing On Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Jun-29-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

NO APPEARANCES. THE TENTATIVE RULING WAS ADOPTED. PLAINTIFF UNITED AUTO CREDIT CORPORATION'S Hearing On Claim Of Exemption. Judgment Debtor's Claim Of Exemption is granted, except for $50 per pay period. COMMISSIONER EVERETT A. HEWLETT, JR. NOT REPORTED.
